OptionDisplayName.SourceString: Remove All Variations of the Selected Item
OptionDisplayName.LocalizedString: Remove All Variations of the Selected Item

OptionDescription.SourceString: When turned on, all variations and rarities of the selected item will be removed from the inventory of the player.
OptionDescription.LocalizedString: When turned on, all variations and rarities of the selected item will be removed from the inventory of the player.
